entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Xule version: 3.0.30050 -

[xule.otherTaxonomyLoadTime] Load taxonomy time 0:00:03.248080 from 'https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2025/entire/us-gaap-entryPoint-std-2025.xsd' - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\TEN_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0135.9835] The element us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLeaseIncome has been used in the filing but does not appear in the financial statements of the filing. This disclosure should appear in the face financials unless it is included in another account caption. If this is the case the following element(s) us-gaap:OperatingLeaseIncomeComprehensiveIncomeExtensibleList should be used to identify the account where the financial statement element us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLeaseIncome is included.
If the filing does not disclose the financial statement captions where the amounts appear, an extension element OperatingLeaseIncomeComprehensiveIncomeExtensibleListNotDisclosedFlag can be used. If this element is used, the rule will not produce an error. The monetary fact value however still needs to be reported in the filing.
The following is an example of a fact that does not have an extensible list.
Concept : us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLeaseIncome Value : 585,473,000 Period : 2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31 Dimensions : srt:StatementScenarioAxis=tenn.gr:TimeBareboatAndPoolingCharterArrangementsMember Unit : USD Decimals: -3
Rule Element Id:9835 Rule version: 29.0.2 - TEN_instance_2024_2025.xml 8903
